items.title: Sources: OpenAI topped $25B in annualized revenue by end-February, up from $21.4B at end-2025; it annualizes by multiplying the last four weeks' revenue by 12 (Sri Muppidi/The Information)
items.title_original: Sources: OpenAI topped $25B in annualized revenue by end-February, up from $21.4B at end-2025; it annualizes by multiplying the last four weeks' revenue by 12 (Sri Muppidi/The Information)
items.title_en: Sources: OpenAI topped $25B in annualized revenue by end-February, up from $21.4B at end-2025; it annualizes by multiplying the last four weeks' revenue by 12 (Sri Muppidi/The Information)
items.title_zh: 资料来源：截至 2 月底，OpenAI 的年化收入突破 250 亿美元，高于 2025 年底的 21.4 亿美元；它通过将过去四个星期的收入乘以 12 进行年度化（Sri Muppidi/The Information）
items.title_bilingual: 资料来源：截至 2 月底，OpenAI 的年化收入突破 250 亿美元，高于 2025 年底的 21.4 亿美元；它通过将过去四个星期的收入乘以 12 进行年度化（Sri Muppidi/The Information） / Sources: OpenAI topped $25B in annualized revenue by end-February, up from $21.4B at end-2025; it annualizes by multiplying the last four weeks' revenue by 12 (Sri Muppidi/The Information)

items.title_en: Apple Music introduces Transparency Tags, a metadata system for music distributors and labels to disclose AI-generated creative elements like artwork or lyrics (Murray Stassen/Music Business Worldwide)
items.title_zh: Apple Music 推出了 Transparency Tags，这是一种元数据系统，供音乐发行商和唱片公司公开 AI 生成的创意元素，例如艺术作品或歌词（Murray Stassen/Music Business Worldwide）
items.title_bilingual: Apple Music 推出了 Transparency Tags，这是一种元数据系统，供音乐发行商和唱片公司公开 AI 生成的创意元素，例如艺术作品或歌词（Murray Stassen/Music Business Worldwide） / Apple Music introduces Transparency Tags, a metadata system for music distributors and labels to disclose AI-generated creative elements like artwork or lyrics (Murray Stassen/Music Business Worldwide)
